config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/07/2024
		Purpose: If previous page not logged in then revert to login page. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		#Check if user is logged or not if not then navigate to login page
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsLoggedIn
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.print("New Session")
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    
			system.perspective.print("self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId%s"%self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId)                 
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
		system.perspective.sendMessage('SerialNumberFocus',scope = 'page' )
			
		
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Painting Station'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Operator Dashboard/Painting Station')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> Painting Station')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/07/2024
		Purpose: script to execue Painting operation. 
	"""
	try:
		if str(self.props.text) != 'null' or str(self.props.text) != ''and str(event.key) == 'Enter':
			areaId  = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
			lineId = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
			workstationId = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
#			areaId  =23
#			lineId = 38
#			workstationId = 366
			userId = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			serialNumber= str(self.props.text)
			params = {'AreaId':areaId,'LineId':lineId,'WorkStationId':workstationId,'CreatedBy':userId,'SerialNumber':serialNumber}
			system.perspective.print("params painting" +str(params))
			result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/Painting/InsertPaintingData",params)
			result = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(result)
			result = result[0][0]
			if str(result) == '1':
				message = 'Painting Started Successfully'
				state = "success"
			elif str(result) == '2' :
				message = 'Serial Number already scanned'
				state = "fail"
			else:
				message = 'Check the Pre-requisites for painting'
				state = "fail"
				
			system.perspective.print("result " +str(result))
			system.perspective.sendMessage("PaintingMaskingTableRefresh", scope = "page")
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
			system.perspective.sendMessage("PaintingMaskingTableRefresh", scope = "page")
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='StartButton'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Templates/Order/WashingMachine')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onAction  -> StartCompleteButton')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		system.perspective.print("lineNumber " +str(lineNumber)+str(errorCode)+str(description))

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	self.focus()
	system.perspective.print('Serial number focus')

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/07/2024
		Purpose: Update painiting data for selected serial number. 
	"""
	try:
		selectedIndex = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblPainting").custom.Selection
		tableData =self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblPainting").props.data
		system.perspective.print(" selectedIndex "+str(selectedIndex)+' tableData '+str(tableData))
		areaId  = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
		lineId = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
		workstationId = self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId

#		areaId  =23
#		lineId = 38
#		workstationId = 366
		userId = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		for i in selectedIndex:
			SerialNumber = tableData.getValueAt(i, "SerialNumber")
			SerialNumber_Id = tableData.getValueAt(i, "SerialNumber_Id")
			M_BOM_Id = tableData.getValueAt(i,'M_BOM_Id')
			params = {'AreaId':areaId,'LineId':lineId,'WorkStationId':workstationId,'M_BOM_Id':M_BOM_Id ,'CreatedBy':userId,'SerialNumber_Id':SerialNumber_Id ,'SerialNumber':SerialNumber}	
			system.perspective.print("params painting " +str(params))
			result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/OperatorDashboard/Painting/UpdatePaintingData",params)
			system.perspective.print("result washine machine" +str(result))
		message = 'Painting is completed for the selected orders Completed'
	
#		if str(result) == '1':
#		result=str(result)
#		system.perspective.print("result " +str(result))
		state = "success"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("WashineMachineTableRefresh", scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRefresh", scope = "page")
	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='StartButton'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Templates/Order/WashingMachine')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onAction  -> StartCompleteButton')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		system.perspective.print(' lineNumber '+str(lineNumber)+' errorCode '+str(errorCode)+str(description))

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/07/2024
		Purpose: deselect current row. 
	"""
	self.getChild("tblOrder").props.selection.selectedRow=-1
	self.getChild("tblOrder").props.selection.selectedColumn=''

"""
		Written By: Sagar Iparkar
		Written Date: 27/07/2024
		Purpose: remove selection on double click and make reset in panel. 
	"""	
	
#	system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
#	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tabConPainting").getChild("cntSequencedDemasking").getChild("tblPainting").props.selection.selectedRow== -1
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tabConPainting").getChild("cntSequencedDemasking").getChild("tblPainting").props.selection.selectedColumn=''
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tabConPainting").getChild("cntSequenced").getChild("tblPainting").props.selection.selectedRow=-1
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tabConPainting").getChild("cntSequenced").getChild("tblPainting").props.selection.selectedColumn=''
	messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
